name: YAZI
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[YAZI] @SAYYI NVARCHAR(500),
@RTN NVARCHAR(4000) output

AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
DECLARE @NUMARA NVARCHAR(500)
DECLARE @ROUNDNUM AS MONEY
SET @ROUNDNUM  =  ROUND(@SAYYI,2)
SET @NUMARA = LTRIM(CONVERT(CHAR,@ROUNDNUM))

DECLARE @TL AS NVARCHAR(18) DECLARE @KR AS NVARCHAR(18) DECLARE @X AS INT
SET @X=0
BS1:
IF @X=LEN(@NUMARA) GOTO SON1
SET @X=@X+1
IF SUBSTRING(RIGHT(@NUMARA,@X),1,1)='.'
SET @KR=RIGHT(@NUMARA,@X-1) 
SET @TL=LEFT(@NUMARA,LEN(@NUMARA)-LEN(@KR)-1)
GOTO BS1
SON1:

IF @KR IS NULL BEGIN SET @TL=@NUMARA SET @KR='' END
DECLARE @YAZI NVARCHAR(500)
SET @YAZI=''

DECLARE @XX1 AS NVARCHAR(15) DECLARE @XX2 AS NVARCHAR(15) DECLARE @XX3 AS NVARCHAR(15) DECLARE @XXB AS NVARCHAR(15)
DECLARE @A15 AS INT DECLARE @A14 AS INT DECLARE @A13 AS INT 
DECLARE @A12 AS INT DECLARE @A11 AS INT DECLARE @A10 AS INT 
DECLARE @A9 AS INT DECLARE @A8 AS INT DECLARE @A7 AS INT 
DECLARE @A6 AS INT DECLARE @A5 AS INT DECLARE @A4 AS INT 
SET @A15=0 SET @A14=0 SET @A13=0
SET @A12=0 SET @A11=0 SET @A10=0
SET @A9=0 SET @A8=0 SET @A7=0
SET @A6=0 SET @A5=0 SET @A4=0
DN:

IF LEN(@TL)>0 
BEGIN
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=0 BEGIN SET @XX1='' SET @XX2='' SET @XX3='' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=1 BEGIN SET @XX1='Bir' SET @XX2='On' SET @XX3='Yüz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=2 BEGIN SET @XX1='İki' SET @XX2='Yirmi' SET @XX3='İkiyüz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=3 BEGIN SET @XX1='Üç' SET @XX2='Otuz' SET @XX3='Üçyüz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=4 BEGIN SET @XX1='Dört' SET @XX2='Kırk' SET @XX3='Dörtyüz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=5 BEGIN SET @XX1='Beş' SET @XX2='Elli' SET @XX3='Beşyüz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=6 BEGIN SET @XX1='Altı' SET @XX2='Altmış' SET @XX3='Altıyüz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=7 BEGIN SET @XX1='Yedi' SET @XX2='Yetmiş' SET @XX3='Yediyüz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=8 BEGIN SET @XX1='Sekiz' SET @XX2='Seksen' SET @XX3='Sekizyüz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@TL,1,1)=9 BEGIN SET @XX1='Dokuz' SET @XX2='Doksan' SET @XX3='Doduzyüz' END 

 IF LEN(@TL)=15 BEGIN SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX3 IF @XX3<>'' SET @A15=1 END
 IF LEN(@TL)=14 BEGIN SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX2 IF @XX2<>'' SET @A14=1 END
 IF LEN(@TL)=13 
BEGIN
	IF @XX1<>'' SET @A13=1
	IF @A15=1 OR @A14=1 OR @A13=1 
	BEGIN
	 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1 + 'Trilyon' 
	END 
	ELSE
	BEGIN 
	 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1
	END
END
 IF LEN(@TL)=12 BEGIN SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX3 IF @XX3<>'' SET @A12=1 END
 IF LEN(@TL)=11 BEGIN SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX2 IF @XX2<>'' SET @A11=1 END
 IF LEN(@TL)=10 
BEGIN
	IF @XX1<>'' SET @A10=1
	IF @A12=1 OR @A11=1 OR @A10=1 
	BEGIN
	 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1 + 'Milyar' 
	END 
	ELSE
	BEGIN 
	 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1
	END
END

 IF LEN(@TL)=9 BEGIN SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX3 IF @XX3<>'' SET @A9=1 END
 IF LEN(@TL)=8 BEGIN SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX2 IF @XX2<>'' SET @A8=1 END
 IF LEN(@TL)=7 
BEGIN
	IF @XX1<>'' SET @A7=1
	IF @A9=1 OR @A8=1 OR @A7=1 
	BEGIN
	 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1 + 'Milyon' 
	END 
	ELSE
	BEGIN 
	 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1
	END
END
 

 IF LEN(@TL)=6 BEGIN SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX3 IF @XX3<>'' SET @A6=1 END
 IF LEN(@TL)=5 BEGIN SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX2 IF @XX2<>'' SET @A5=1 END
 IF LEN(@TL)=4 
BEGIN
	IF @XX1<>'' SET @A4=1
	IF @A6=1 OR @A5=1 OR @A4=1 
	BEGIN
	 IF @XX1='Bir' AND @A6=0 AND @A5=0 AND @A8=0 AND @A9=0 AND @A11=0 AND @A12=0 AND @A14=0 AND @A15=0 SET @XX1='' 
	 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1 + 'Bin' 
	END 
	ELSE
	BEGIN 
	 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1
	END
	

END

 IF LEN(@TL)=3 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX3
 IF LEN(@TL)=2 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX2
 IF LEN(@TL)=1 SET @YAZI=@YAZI + @XX1
SET @TL=SUBSTRING(@TL,2,LEN(@TL)-1)

GOTO DN
END
ELSE
BEGIN
IF @YAZI<>'' SET @YAZI=@YAZI + '-TL,'
	--SELECT	@KR,@TL,@YAZI ,@NUMARA
END

SET  @KR=SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR,ROUND('1.' + @KR,2)),3,2)
IF LEN(@KR)=1 set @KR=@KR+'0'
DECLARE @YAZI2 AS NVARCHAR(500)
SET @YAZI2=''
DN2:
IF LEN(@KR)>0 
BEGIN
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=0 BEGIN SET @XX1='' SET @XX2='' END
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=1 BEGIN SET @XX1='Bir' SET @XX2='On' END
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=2 BEGIN SET @XX1='İki' SET @XX2='Yirmi'END 
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=3 BEGIN SET @XX1='Üç' SET @XX2='Otuz' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=4 BEGIN SET @XX1='Dört' SET @XX2='Kırk'END 
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=5 BEGIN SET @XX1='Beş' SET @XX2='Elli' END 
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=6 BEGIN SET @XX1='Altı' SET @XX2='Altmış'END 
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=7 BEGIN SET @XX1='Yedi' SET @XX2='Yetmiş'END 
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=8 BEGIN SET @XX1='Sekiz' SET @XX2='Seksen'END 
IF SUBSTRING(@KR,1,1)=9 BEGIN SET @XX1='Dokuz' SET @XX2='Doksan'END 

 IF LEN(@KR)=2 SET @YAZI2=@YAZI2 + @XX2
 IF LEN(@KR)=1 SET @YAZI2=@YAZI2 + @XX1



SET @KR=SUBSTRING(@KR,2,LEN(@KR)-1)
GOTO DN2
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	IF @YAZI2<>'' SET @YAZI2=@YAZI2 + '-KR.' ELSE SET @YAZI=LEFT(@YAZI,LEN(@YAZI)-1) + '.'
END

SET @RTN=@YAZI +  @YAZI2
